name: Ab Wheel Rollout
setup: Kneel on padded surface, ab wheel in hands
Wheel under shoulders, arms extended forward
execution: Roll wheel forward as far as you can maintain core tension
Keep body in straight plank — don't sag
Pull back using abs to starting position
cues: Squeeze glutes and brace core before every rep
Stop when you feel your back about to arch
progression: Wall rollout → Kneeling limited ROM → Kneeling full → Standing
